_comment: Per-image pipeline parameter overrides. Keys are filename stems (no extension). All keys are optional — omit to use the pipeline default. Supported keys per image entry: edge_buffer_um (float — boundary buffer in µm, replaces config.EDGE_BUFFER_UM for this image), gamma (float — forces a specific Stage 2 gamma correction, skipping the contrast sweep; e.g. 1.0=no change 2.0=brighten 0.5=darken), morph_open_kernel_px (int — Stage 2 morphological opening radius in pixels; removes dark features narrower than this from the pit candidate list before Stage 3; 0 or omit=disabled), stage3 (object — per-rule Stage 3 threshold overrides: r3_max_aspect_ratio float lower=tighter, r4_min_circularity float higher=tighter, r7_max_intensity_ratio float lower=tighter, r8_min_aspect_ratio float lower=catches-more-scratches).
